_comment: Test fixture for the scenario suite (S3 seasonal prep). The 8 seasonal windows from shared/seo-intelligence-engine.md 'Seasonal SEO lead times' as {YEAR}-templated obligation rows (one YouTube publish-by and one Pinterest pin-by row per window). The runner substitutes {YEAR}. This fixture exists BECAUSE no machine-readable ISO source exists (gap G6); it hand-transcribes the engine's prose table for test purposes only and is not a canonical source.

obligations.required_action: Publish fall / Halloween YouTube video (peak Sept 15 to Oct 20)
obligations.evidence_text: Fall / Halloween: YouTube publish by September 1.

obligations.required_action: Pin fall / Halloween boards to Pinterest (peak Sept 15 to Oct 20)
obligations.evidence_text: Fall / Halloween: Pinterest pin by August 15.

obligations.required_action: Publish Thanksgiving / late fall YouTube video (peak Nov 1 to Nov 25)
obligations.evidence_text: Thanksgiving / late fall: YouTube publish by October 25.

obligations.required_action: Pin Thanksgiving / late fall boards to Pinterest (peak Nov 1 to Nov 25)
obligations.evidence_text: Thanksgiving / late fall: Pinterest pin by October 10.

obligations.required_action: Publish Christmas / holiday YouTube video (peak Nov 20 to Dec 15)
obligations.evidence_text: Christmas / holiday: YouTube publish by November 10.

obligations.required_action: Pin Christmas / holiday boards to Pinterest (peak Nov 20 to Dec 15)
obligations.evidence_text: Christmas / holiday: Pinterest pin by October 31.

obligations.required_action: Publish New Year organizing YouTube video (peak Dec 26 to Jan 15)
obligations.evidence_text: New Year organizing: YouTube publish by December 20.

obligations.required_action: Pin New Year organizing boards to Pinterest (peak Dec 26 to Jan 15)
obligations.evidence_text: New Year organizing: Pinterest pin by December 10.

obligations.required_action: Publish Valentine / cozy February YouTube video (peak Feb 1 to Feb 14)
obligations.evidence_text: Valentine / cozy Feb: YouTube publish by January 28.

obligations.required_action: Pin Valentine / cozy February boards to Pinterest (peak Feb 1 to Feb 14)
obligations.evidence_text: Valentine / cozy Feb: Pinterest pin by January 15.

obligations.required_action: Publish spring refresh YouTube video (peak Mar 1 to Apr 15)
obligations.evidence_text: Spring refresh: YouTube publish by February 20.

obligations.required_action: Pin spring refresh boards to Pinterest (peak Mar 1 to Apr 15)
obligations.evidence_text: Spring refresh: Pinterest pin by February 10.

obligations.required_action: Publish summer outdoor YouTube video (peak May 1 to Jun 30)
obligations.evidence_text: Summer outdoor: YouTube publish by April 25.

obligations.required_action: Pin summer outdoor boards to Pinterest (peak May 1 to Jun 30)
obligations.evidence_text: Summer outdoor: Pinterest pin by April 10.

obligations.required_action: Publish back-to-school / fall prep YouTube video (peak Aug 1 to Aug 25)
obligations.evidence_text: Back-to-school / fall prep: YouTube publish by July 25.

obligations.required_action: Pin back-to-school / fall prep boards to Pinterest (peak Aug 1 to Aug 25)
obligations.evidence_text: Back-to-school / fall prep: Pinterest pin by July 10.
